name: MorningAI
description: Daily-scheduled AI news tracker. Collects updates from 80+ AI entities across 5 automated sources + agent X/Twitter search every 24 hours (default 08:00 UTC+8). Generates scored, deduplicated Markdown reports. Supports unattended cron/scheduled execution.

plugins.name: morning-ai
plugins.description: Track 80+ AI entities across Reddit, HN, GitHub, HuggingFace, arXiv, and agent X/Twitter search. Daily-scheduled with scored, deduplicated Markdown reports. Supports unattended cron execution.
